title: Ennui's Bigger Gambiarra
description: A messy workaround (a.k.a. uma gambiarra) that adds compatibility with Ennui's Bigger Inventories to certain mods.
body:
# Ennui's Bigger Gambiarra
![A banner for the Ennui's Bigger Gambiarra mod, which is noticibly an edit of Ennui's Bigger Inventories banner. Ennui is visible on the foreground shoving "Hopes", "Dreams", and a cropped word into a chest next to another chest, covered with tape and a bandage. On the background, the EMI and Inspecio compatibility screenshots can be seen alongside an "and more!". On the top-right corner, the word logo "Ennui's Bigger gambiarra" appears, with the word "gambiarra" being obviously an edit over the original mod's banner.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae971593883ae0eb69f65821986e9546d7450f71.png)

Ennui's Bigger Gambiarra is, as its name state, a massive hackjob that duct-tapes compatibility with [Ennui's Bigger Inventories](https://modrinth.com/mod/ennuis_bigger_inventories) to other mods as its job!

## Dependencies

This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) and [Ennui's Bigger Inventories](https://modrinth.com/mod/ennuis_bigger_inventories) to be installed. Both Fabric Loader and [Quilt Loader](https://quiltmc.org) are options for loader. The targetted mods are optional, and their duct-tape won't be applied if they aren't installed.

## Targetted Mods

As of 0.5.0 (and Minecraft 1.21.1), the current mods targetted are:

- [Accessories]([https://modrinth.com/mod/accessories)
- [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi)
- [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)

In the future, more mods will be added! But do remember about [the Compatibility section](https://modrinth.com/mod/ennuis_bigger_inventories)! This mod won't necessarily cover everything!
